response_parsed.opinion: Managing and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines can be challenging, especially when it comes to navigating differing opinions and perspectives. As a retired 78-year-old man living in Milan, Italy, I have found that taking a thoughtful and informed approach is key. Here are some strategies that may help:
